responses: Hi! I'm NexusBot, your international student assistant. How can I help?
Hello! Ask me anything about visa, housing, work, or healthcare in Russia.
You need passport, migration card, registration, and invitation letter.
For visa extension contact your university international office.
Contact your university international office for visa extension support.
Visa extension requires your passport, migration card and university documents.
You need a valid work permit to work legally in Russia.
Apply for a work permit at the local migration office with your university documents.

patterns: how many hours can i work
responses: International students can work up to 20 hours per week during term time.
During holidays you can work full time as an international student.
Emergency number in Russia is 103 for ambulance, 112 for all emergencies.
Call 112 immediately in any emergency situation.
Health insurance is mandatory for international students in Russia.
Your university usually provides basic health insurance. Check with your international office.
Visit your university clinic first. For emergencies call 103.
Ask your university international office for the nearest recommended hospital.
